product_name: Omi Brotherhood Menturm Mosquito & Insect Repellent Mist Pocket Spray 25ml
product_description: Easy to carry , super compact insect repellent . Suitable for travel , outdoor function and everyday use . Its fresh citrus herb fragrance naturally repels insects while keeping you feel refreshed. Mentham Insect Repellent Mist Pocket N is a DEET-based insect repellent spray specially designed for outdoor protection. DEET is considered a highly effective insect repellent and is the gold standard by organizations like the World Health Organization,  the CDC, and the EPA, USA . This non-gas, pocket-sized mist is easy to carry and convenient to use on the go. It offers a refreshing, non-pungent citrus herbal scent and includes moisturizing ingredients like aloe extract and jojoba oil for added skin care. Key Features: Pocket-sized and travel-friendly Smooth, non-sticky finish with fine powder infusion Non-gas type – reduces scatter risk Light, fresh scent of citrus herbs Moisturizes with aloe extract & jojoba oil Effective against mosquitoes, black flies, stable flies, horseflies, bedbugs, fleas, house mites, and ticks Active Ingredient: DEET 8% Other Ingredients: Polyethylene powder, silylated silicic anhydride, polyoxyethylene polyoxypropylene glycol ether, ethanol, fragrance, aloe extract-2, jojoba oil, purified water How to Use: Shake well before each use. After opening, shake the container well and press the button several times before spraying. Spray about 10 cm away from skin. For face and neck, spray on the palm and apply gently by hand. Suitable for use on exposed skin such as feet and arms. Important Precautions: ⚠️ Do not use on infants under 6 months of age. ⚠️ Not for use around eyes, mucous membranes, wounds, or on the face. For children aged 6 months to under 2 years: use only once a day under supervision. For children aged 2 to under 12 years: use up to 3 times a day under supervision. Use only when necessary, especially in areas with many black flies. If irritation, redness, or swelling occurs, discontinue use and consult a doctor or pharmacist. product_name: Shiseido Urea Skin Care Cream 100g
product_description: Shiseido Urea Cream is a Japanese skincare cream containing 10% of urea, squalane, and hyaluronic acid to moisturize dry and rough skin, keeping it soft, smooth, and supple. Urea, also known as carbamide, is a natural substance compound found in the surface layer of our skin that maintains skin moisture balance and the suppleness of the skin. The levels of urea in our skin are reduced when the skin is dry or in certain skin conditions such as dermatitis or eczema. This causes rough, irritated, scaly, or flaky skin. Urea-based skincare products hold water on molecules enabling skin cells to absorb and retain additional moisture. ​​​​​​​ FEATURES: This cream blended with 10% of urea penetrates quickly and deeply into the skin, making even the hardest skin from fingertips, heels, and knees, more flexible and soft. Urea is non-toxic, non-allergenic, anti-itch, anti-microbial, colorless, and odorless. Shiseido Urea cream spreads well when applied, with no sticky feeling. product_name: Cos De BAHA Hydroquinone Brightening Serum (HB) 30ml
product_description: Cos De BAHA Hydroquinone Brightening Serum (HB) 30ml Made in Korea Hydroquinone is a skin-lightening agent. It bleaches the skin, which can be helpful when treating different forms of hyperpigmentation. Historically, there’s been some back-and-forth on the safety of hydroquinone. In 1982, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration recognized the ingredient as safe and effective Trusted Source. Several years later, concerns about safety prompted retailers to pull hydroquinone from the market. The FDA went on to discover that many of the products in question contained contaminants like mercury. They established that these contaminants were behind reports of adverse effects. Since then, the FDA has confirmed that hydroquinone can be safely sold over the counter (OTC) in 2 percent concentrations. which Cos De BAHA has prepared for a long time. Now, check for yourself the effects of improving the texture of your skin. How can Hydroquinone make your skin healthy? Hydroquinone bleaches your skin by decreasing the number of melanocytes present. Melanocytes make melanin, which is what produces your skin tone. In cases of hyperpigmentation, more melanin is present due to an increase in melanocyte production. By controlling these melanocytes, your skin will become more evenly toned over time. It takes about four weeks on average for the ingredient to take effect. It may take several months of consistent use before you see full results. Ingredients : Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Propanediol, Arbutin, Niacinamide, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroquinone, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Salicylic Acid, Kojic Acid, Lactic Acid, *Hamamelis Virginiana Leaf Ext, *Rosmarinus Officinalis Ext,*Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Ext, *Thymus Vulgaris Ext,*Aspalathus Linearis Ext, Disodium EDTA. *Mark: N.O.I.P 52% How to use : Apply serum to clean skin every other day and work your way up to daily use. You’ll begin to see results within 4 weeks. Be sure to wear sunscreen during the day on areas where you’ve used this serum. SAFETY WARNING After using this product continuously for 60 days you'll need to give your skin a break and stop using the serum for 30 days. Users of hydroquinone can develop resistance if used continuously without a break and also risk developing a condition called Ochronosis which is a permanent darkening of the skin. While this is a rare condition, it's still important that you pause using any hydroquinone product after 60 days. You can begin re-using the serum after a 30 daybreak. During the 30 day break, we recommend using Cos De BAHA Vitamin C Serum + AHA/BHA Toner to maintain your new glow. You can repeat this cycle to keep your skin looking bright and youthful. Warning: Some users of this product may experience minor skin irritation. If irritation becomes severe, discontinue use and seek medical advice. Always spot test the product before use. product_description: The Medicube Kojic Acid Turmeric Resurfacing Toner is a multi-action, brightening, and exfoliating toner that can be used on the face and body. It is formulated to even out skin tone, fade dark spots and hyperpigmentation, smooth rough skin texture, and provide hydration. The Medicube Kojic Acid Turmeric Resurfacing Toner is a multi-action, brightening, and exfoliating toner that can be used on the face and body. It is formulated to even out skin tone, fade dark spots and hyperpigmentation, smooth rough skin texture, and provide hydration. Key ingredients and their benefits This lightweight, non-sticky toner features a blend of active ingredients to improve skin clarity and radiance. Kojic Acid: Targets dark spots and uneven skin tone by inhibiting melanin production. Turmeric (Curcuma Longa Root Extract): An antioxidant-rich botanical that soothes inflammation and helps protect the skin from environmental stressors. Glycolic Acid (AHA): A gentle exfoliant that removes dead skin cells from the surface to improve rough texture and promote smoother, more balanced skin. Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): Helps improve skin clarity, regulate oil production, and strengthens the skin’s moisture barrier. Hyaluronic Acid and Panthenol: Hydrate and soothe the skin, ensuring the formula is not overly drying. How to use: After cleansing, apply the toner directly onto the skin using the hands-free nozzle or a cotton pad. Gently swipe or pat the product across your face, neck, or other areas of the body that need brightening or smoothing, such as elbows, knees, or underarms. Follow up with a serum and moisturizer. If using in the daytime, apply sunscreen, as exfoliating products can increase sun sensitivity. product_description: The SKIN1004 Madagascar Centella Tone Brightening Capsule Ampoule 30ml is a fast-absorbing facial serum designed to brighten, hydrate, and calm dull or uneven skin. It features micro-beads of the patented ingredient MadeWhite™, which dissolve upon application to provide a gentle, brightening effect. The formula is generally considered suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Key ingredients The formula includes a combination of soothing and brightening ingredients: Centella Asiatica Extract: Makes up 77% of the formula. Tranexamic Acid (2%): An amino acid that helps to reduce melanin production and alleviate hyperpigmentation. 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid: A stable and less irritating derivative of Vitamin C that helps with brightening. MadeWhite™: A patented natural ingredient from Centella Asiatica used for tone correction. Benefits Brightens and evens skin tone: The combination of niacinamide, tranexamic acid, and MadeWhite™ helps to correct and brighten a dull or uneven complexion. Improves skin texture: The formula leaves the skin feeling soft and moisturized, with many users reporting a smoother texture. How to use: The ampoule is designed for both morning and night use. After cleansing and toning, take 2–3 drops using the dropper. Apply the ampoule evenly over your face and neck. Gently pat into the skin to aid absorption. For daytime use, follow up with moisturizer and sunscreen. Continue to pat until the essence is fully absorbed. Follow with your regular moisturizer or other skincare products. The essence can be used both in the morning and evening as part of your skincare routine. product_name: The Ordinary Salicylic Acid 2% Masque 50ml
product_description: The Ordinary Salicylic Acid 2% Masque 50ml Made in Canada * Disclaimer: Country of origin and packaging may vary depending on the lot/batch Salicylic Acid 2% Masque is formulated to target lackluster tone and textural irregularities. The formula, infused with charcoal and clays, aims to enhance the appearance of smoothness and clarity, leaving the skin feeling refreshed. The structure of salicylic acid facilitates its lipophilicity and miscibility with the lipids located on the surface of the skin. It is a suitable ingredient for targeting the removal of dead skin cells on the surface of oily and blemish-prone skin, with the purpose of revealing more radiant skin beneath. Charcoal and clays are ingredients renowned for their deep cleansing abilities due to their porosity and large surface area available for adsorption. They aid the removal of facial impurities that would otherwise remain on the skin surface and clog pores. In comparison to Salicylic Acid 2% Solution, Salicylic Acid 2% Masque is a rinse-off formula. Leave on for no longer than 10 minutes in order to maximize the exfoliating benefits. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Kaolin, Squalane, Glycerin, Dimethyl Isosorbide, Silica Cetyl Silylate, Salicylic Acid, Sodium Polyacrylate, Pentylene Glycol, Charcoal Powder, 4-T-Butylcyclohexanol, Sclerotium Gum, Acacia Senegal Gum, Xanthan Gum, Phytic Acid, Polysorbate 20, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Chlorphenesin, Phenoxyethanol. How To Use Use once or twice a week on thoroughly clean, dry skin. Do not use on wet skin. Apply evenly across face using fingertips, avoiding the eye area. Leave on for no more than 10 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Do not use on sensitive, peeling or compromised skin. Avoid the eye contour and contact with eyes both during application and rinse off. Patch testing prior to use is advised: Apply the product as directed to a small area once a day for three days to test if you are sensitive to this product. If you develop severe irritation, hives, swelling of eyes and mouth, blistering, or difficulty breathing, rinse off, cease use and consult a physician right away. Keep out of reach of children.
